author: Brotha Misi
title: Amazing app
content: Yo this app good as guys I’m not even gonna lie. You can get your music from the files app and everything. App layout look clean asf too 👍. Been looking for an music player for so long broo thank God 😭😭

author: Aleph_Tav
title: Works well with Carplay
content: Works well with carplay, love the EQ as well-one thing that would be a nice addition would be the ability to play music at 432hz and 528hz instead of just the standard 440hz. Yes its a personal preference but would make an already great app that little bit better - seriously thinking of completely dropping the apple music app in favour of this too.

author: Nshakabdhsy
title: More bugs
content: Bluetooth audio won't play after last update

author: YT keegan
content: Absolutely the best music app ever , it’s straight up saved me a lot of money

author: psiphi75
title: Good, but has some rough edges
content: One such rough edge is that when you return to the player after not using it for a while, it loses your position in the audio file. Hence podcasts become a pain.

author: harrynz
title: Please fix
content: After update few days ago i lost ability to speed up. That was only reason i was using this app to use higher speed play

author: (PuckerFactor)
title: Surprised how good this is.
content: I've tried a lot of players that stream from Dropbox, this one is the best. I have my entire music collection on Dropbox. No other app that streams has as good interface and sound quality as Flacbox. The 10 Band equalizer is making the difference with my pair of JBL Charge 3 speakers. I like that the playlist works from Dropbox and also the ability to download the files on the playlist to my iPad to keep the files locally. All these features work in the free version but I think it's worth paying the few bucks to the developer for the ad-free version.
